short: CLI tool for LLMs to interact with Jira Cloud REST API
long:
Project repository: https://github.com/major/jira-agent
File new bugs and RFEs there.
example:
jira-agent issue get PROJ-123 --fields key,summary,status
jira-agent issue search --jql "assignee = currentUser()"
jira-agent project list --output csv

local_flags.name: compact
local_flags.usage: Compact JSON output: strip nulls/empties, flatten single-key objects, JSON Lines for arrays

local_flags.name: dry-run
local_flags.usage: Preview write-capable composite commands without making changes

persistent_flags.name: compact
persistent_flags.usage: Compact JSON output: strip nulls/empties, flatten single-key objects, JSON Lines for arrays

persistent_flags.name: dry-run
persistent_flags.usage: Preview write-capable composite commands without making changes

example:
jira-agent audit list
jira-agent audit list --from 2024-01-01T00:00:00.000+0000 --to 2024-12-31T23:59:59.000+0000
jira-agent audit list --filter "user created" --limit 25

jira-agent audit list
jira-agent audit list --from 2024-01-01T00:00:00.000+0000 --to 2024-12-31T23:59:59.000+0000
jira-agent audit list --filter "user created" --limit 25

local_flags.name: filter
local_flags.usage: Text filter across audit record fields

local_flags.name: from
local_flags.usage: Start date or datetime for created records

local_flags.name: to
local_flags.usage: End date or datetime for created records

example:
jira-agent backlog list --board-id 42
jira-agent backlog move --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2

short: List backlog issues for a board
example: jira-agent backlog list --board-id 42

local_flags.name: fields
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated list of fields to return

example: jira-agent backlog move --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2

local_flags.name: issues
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated issue keys to move to backlog (required)

short: Jira Software board operations (list, create, get, filter, delete, properties)
example:
jira-agent board list
jira-agent board create --name "Team board" --type scrum --filter 10000
jira-agent board get 42
jira-agent board filter 10000
jira-agent board issues 42 --jql "status = Open"
jira-agent board property list 42
jira-agent board config 42

jira-agent board create --name "Team board" --type scrum --filter 10000
jira-agent board create --name "Team board" --type kanban --filter 10000 --location-project PROJ

local_flags.name: filter
local_flags.usage: Saved filter ID backing the board

local_flags.name: location-project
local_flags.usage: Project key or ID for the board location

example: jira-agent board delete 42
jira-agent board epics 42

jira-agent board filter 10000
jira-agent board filter 10000 --max-results 25

short: Get Jira Software board details by ID
example: jira-agent board get 42

jira-agent board issues 42
jira-agent board issues 42 --jql "status = Open"

local_flags.name: fields
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated list of fields to return

example:
jira-agent board list
jira-agent board list --type scrum
jira-agent board list --project PROJ

local_flags.name: project
local_flags.usage: Filter by project key or ID referenced by the board filter

local_flags.name: type
local_flags.usage: Filter by board type: scrum or kanban

short: List projects associated with a board
example: jira-agent board projects 42

jira-agent board property list 42
jira-agent board property get 42 com.example.flag
jira-agent board property set 42 com.example.flag --value-json '{"enabled":true}'
jira-agent board property delete 42 com.example.flag
jira-agent board property get 42 com.example.flag
jira-agent board property list 42
jira-agent board property set 42 com.example.flag --value-json '{"enabled":true}'

short: List versions associated with a board
example: jira-agent board versions 42

short: Project component operations (list, get, create, update, delete, issue-counts)
example:
jira-agent component list --project PROJ
jira-agent component get 10100
jira-agent component create --project PROJ --name "Backend"

jira-agent component create --project PROJ --name "Backend"
jira-agent component create --project PROJ --name "Frontend" --lead-account-id 5b10a284

local_flags.name: assignee-type
local_flags.usage: Default assignee type: PROJECT_DEFAULT, COMPONENT_LEAD, PROJECT_LEAD, UNASSIGNED

local_flags.name: lead-account-id
local_flags.usage: Account ID of the component lead

example: jira-agent component delete 10100

local_flags.name: move-issues-to
local_flags.usage: Component ID to reassign issues to before deletion

example: jira-agent component get 10100

short: Get related issue counts for a component
example: jira-agent component issue-counts 10100
jira-agent component list --project PROJ

local_flags.name: order-by
local_flags.usage: Order results by field (e.g. name, description)

local_flags.name: query
local_flags.usage: Filter components by name (case-insensitive substring match)

example: jira-agent component update 10100 --name "Backend Services"

local_flags.name: assignee-type
local_flags.usage: Default assignee type: PROJECT_DEFAULT, COMPONENT_LEAD, PROJECT_LEAD, UNASSIGNED

local_flags.name: lead-account-id
local_flags.usage: Account ID of the component lead

example:
jira-agent dashboard list
jira-agent dashboard get 10001
jira-agent dashboard gadgets 10001

jira-agent dashboard copy 10001 --name "Team dashboard copy"
jira-agent dashboard copy 10001 --name "Team dashboard copy" --extend-admin-permissions

local_flags.name: extend-admin-permissions
local_flags.usage: Extend admin permissions for the operation

example:
jira-agent dashboard create --name "Team dashboard"
jira-agent dashboard create --name "Team dashboard" --share-permissions-json '[{"type":"authenticated"}]'
jira-agent dashboard create --body-json '{"name":"Team dashboard","sharePermissions":[],"editPermissions":[]}'

local_flags.name: extend-admin-permissions
local_flags.usage: Extend admin permissions for the operation

example: jira-agent dashboard delete 10001
jira-agent dashboard gadgets 10001
jira-agent dashboard get 10001

jira-agent dashboard list
jira-agent dashboard list --filter my
jira-agent dashboard list --search "ops"

jira-agent dashboard update 10001 --name "Team dashboard"
jira-agent dashboard update 10001 --name "Team dashboard" --description "Team metrics"
jira-agent dashboard update 10001 --body-json '{"name":"Team dashboard","sharePermissions":[],"editPermissions":[]}'

local_flags.name: extend-admin-permissions
local_flags.usage: Extend admin permissions for the operation

short: Agile epic operations (get, issues, move-issues, orphans, remove-issues, rank)
example:
jira-agent epic get PROJ-50
jira-agent epic issues PROJ-50
jira-agent epic move-issues PROJ-50 --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2

short: Get epic details by ID or key
example:
jira-agent epic get PROJ-50
jira-agent epic get 12345

jira-agent epic issues PROJ-50
jira-agent epic issues PROJ-50 --jql "status = Open"

local_flags.name: fields
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated list of fields to return

example: jira-agent epic move-issues PROJ-50 --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2
jira-agent epic orphans

local_flags.name: fields
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated list of fields to return

short: Rank an epic before or after another epic
example:
jira-agent epic rank PROJ-50 --before PROJ-49
jira-agent epic rank PROJ-50 --after PROJ-51

local_flags.name: rank-after
local_flags.usage: Epic ID or key to rank after

local_flags.name: rank-before
local_flags.usage: Epic ID or key to rank before

example: jira-agent epic remove-issues --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2

local_flags.name: issues
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated issue keys to remove from their epic (required)

example:
jira-agent field list
jira-agent field search --type custom --query "story points"

short: Custom field context operations (list, create, update, delete)
example:
jira-agent field context list customfield_10001
jira-agent field context create customfield_10001 --name "Global context"

short: Create a context for a custom field
example: jira-agent field context create customfield_10001 --name "Global context"

local_flags.name: issue-types
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated issue type IDs to associate

example: jira-agent field context delete customfield_10001 10200

short: List contexts for a custom field
example: jira-agent field context list customfield_10001
jira-agent field context update customfield_10001 10200 --name "Updated context"
jira-agent field list

short: Custom field option operations (list, create, update, delete, reorder)
example:
jira-agent field option list customfield_10001 10200
jira-agent field option create customfield_10001 10200 --options-json '[{"value":"Option A"}]'

short: Create options for a custom field context
example: jira-agent field option create customfield_10001 10200 --options-json '[{"value":"Option A"},{"value":"Option B"}]'
jira-agent field option delete customfield_10001 10200 10300

short: List options for a custom field context
example: jira-agent field option list customfield_10001 10200

jira-agent field option reorder customfield_10001 10200 --option-ids 10300,10301,10302
jira-agent field option reorder customfield_10001 10200 --option-ids 10301 --after 10300

local_flags.name: anchor
local_flags.usage: Anchor option ID (required for Before/After positions)

local_flags.name: option-ids
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated option IDs to move (in desired order)

short: Update options for a custom field context
example: jira-agent field option update customfield_10001 10200 --options-json '[{"id":"10300","value":"Updated option"}]'

local_flags.name: option-id
local_flags.usage: ID of the option to update

short: Search fields with filtering and pagination
example:
jira-agent field search --type custom
jira-agent field search --query "story points"

local_flags.name: max-results
local_flags.usage: Maximum number of results to return

local_flags.name: start-at
local_flags.usage: Index of the first result to return

local_flags.name: type
local_flags.usage: Filter by field type: custom, system

example:
jira-agent filter list
jira-agent filter get 10001
jira-agent filter favorites
jira-agent filter create --name "My open bugs" --jql "project = PROJ AND type = Bug AND status = Open"

short: Work with the default filter share scope
example:
jira-agent filter default-share-scope get
jira-agent filter default-share-scope set --scope PRIVATE

short: Get the default filter share scope
example: jira-agent filter default-share-scope get

short: Set the default filter share scope
example: jira-agent filter default-share-scope set --scope PRIVATE

local_flags.name: scope
local_flags.usage: Default scope: GLOBAL, AUTHENTICATED, or PRIVATE

example: jira-agent filter delete 10001
jira-agent filter favorites
jira-agent filter get 10001

jira-agent filter list
jira-agent filter list --expand owner,jql
jira-agent filter permissions 10001

jira-agent filter share 10001 --with user:5b10a2844c20165700ede21g
jira-agent filter share 10001 --with group:team-group-id
jira-agent filter share 10001 --type project --project-id 10000

local_flags.name: with
local_flags.usage: Permission shorthand: global, authenticated, user:<account-id>, group:<group-id>, groupname:<name>, project:<project-id>, project-role:<project-id>:<role-id>

example: jira-agent filter unshare 10001 --permission-id 10002
jira-agent filter update 10001 --name "Updated filter" --jql "project = PROJ AND status != Done"

jira-agent group list
jira-agent group get --groupname "jira-users"
jira-agent group members --groupname "jira-users"

short: Add a user to a group
example: jira-agent group add-member --groupname "dev-team" --account-id 5b10a2844c20165700ede21g
jira-agent group create "new-team"
jira-agent group delete --groupname "old-team"

jira-agent group get --groupname "jira-users"
jira-agent group get --group-id abc-123
jira-agent group list

short: Search users and groups for pickers
example: jira-agent group member-picker --query "john"
jira-agent group members --groupname "jira-users"

short: Remove a user from a group
example: jira-agent group remove-member --groupname "dev-team" --account-id 5b10a2844c20165700ede21g

short: Issue operations (get, search, create, edit, delete, transition, assign, comment, changelog, rank, count, notify, meta, bulk, property)
example:
jira-agent issue get PROJ-123
jira-agent issue search --jql "project = PROJ AND status = Open"
jira-agent issue create --project PROJ --type Story --summary "New feature"
jira-agent issue transition PROJ-123 --to "In Progress"

jira-agent issue assign PROJ-123 5b10a2844c20165700ede21g
jira-agent issue assign PROJ-123 --unassign
jira-agent issue assign PROJ-123 --default

jira-agent issue attachment list PROJ-123
jira-agent issue attachment add PROJ-123 --file report.pdf
jira-agent issue attachment get 10001

short: Add an attachment to an issue
example:
jira-agent issue attachment add PROJ-123 --file report.pdf
jira-agent issue attachment add PROJ-123 --file doc.pdf --file image.png
jira-agent issue attachment delete 10001
jira-agent issue attachment get 10001
jira-agent issue attachment list PROJ-123

jira-agent issue bulk fetch --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2 --fields key,summary,status
jira-agent issue bulk create --issues-json '[{"fields":{"project":{"key":"PROJ"},"issuetype":{"name":"Task"},"summary":"Task 1"}}]'
jira-agent issue bulk transition --transitions-json '[{"selectedIssueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1"],"transitionId":"11"}]'

short: Create multiple issues from Jira issueUpdates JSON
example: jira-agent issue bulk create --issues-json '[{"fields":{"project":{"key":"PROJ"},"issuetype":{"name":"Task"},"summary":"Task 1"}}]'

local_flags.name: issues-json
local_flags.usage: JSON array of issueUpdates or object with issueUpdates (required, max 50 issues)

example:
jira-agent issue bulk delete --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2,PROJ-3
jira-agent issue bulk delete --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2 --send-notification=false

short: Bulk edit issues (up to 1000 issues, 200 fields)
example: jira-agent issue bulk edit --payload-json '{"selectedIssueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1","PROJ-2"],"selectedActions":["priority"],"editedFieldsInput":{"priority":{"name":"High"}}}'

local_flags.name: payload-json
local_flags.usage: Full JSON payload with selectedIssueIdsOrKeys, selectedActions, editedFieldsInput, and optional sendBulkNotification (required)

short: List editable fields for bulk edit
example:
jira-agent issue bulk edit-fields --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2
jira-agent issue bulk edit-fields --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2 --search-text priority

short: Fetch multiple issues by key or ID
example:
jira-agent issue bulk fetch --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2,PROJ-3
jira-agent issue bulk fetch --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2 --fields key,summary,status

local_flags.name: fields-by-keys
local_flags.usage: Treat field identifiers as field keys instead of field IDs

local_flags.name: issues
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated issue keys or IDs (required, max 100 issues)

short: Bulk move issues to a target project and issue type (up to 1000)
example: jira-agent issue bulk move --payload-json '{"targetToSourcesMapping":{"DEST":{"issueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1"],"targetIssueType":"Task"}}}'

local_flags.name: payload-json
local_flags.usage: Full JSON payload with targetToSourcesMapping and optional sendBulkNotification (required)

example: jira-agent issue bulk status 10641

jira-agent issue bulk transition --transitions-json '[{"selectedIssueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1"],"transitionId":"11"}]'
jira-agent issue bulk transition --transitions-json '[{"selectedIssueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1"],"transitionId":"11"}]' --send-notification=false

local_flags.name: transitions-json
local_flags.usage: JSON array of transition inputs, e.g. [{"selectedIssueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1"],"transitionId":"11"}] (required)

short: List available transitions for bulk transition
example: jira-agent issue bulk transitions --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2,PROJ-3

short: Create multiple issues from Jira issueUpdates JSON
example: jira-agent issue bulk-create --issues-json '[{"fields":{"project":{"key":"PROJ"},"issuetype":{"name":"Task"},"summary":"Task 1"}}]'

local_flags.name: issues-json
local_flags.usage: JSON array of issueUpdates or object with issueUpdates (required, max 50 issues)

example:
jira-agent issue bulk-delete --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2,PROJ-3
jira-agent issue bulk-delete --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2 --send-notification=false

short: Bulk edit issues (up to 1000 issues, 200 fields)
example: jira-agent issue bulk-edit --payload-json '{"selectedIssueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1","PROJ-2"],"selectedActions":["priority"],"editedFieldsInput":{"priority":{"name":"High"}}}'

local_flags.name: payload-json
local_flags.usage: Full JSON payload with selectedIssueIdsOrKeys, selectedActions, editedFieldsInput, and optional sendBulkNotification (required)

short: List editable fields for bulk edit
example:
jira-agent issue bulk-edit-fields --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2
jira-agent issue bulk-edit-fields --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2 --search-text priority

short: Fetch multiple issues by key or ID
example:
jira-agent issue bulk-fetch --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2,PROJ-3
jira-agent issue bulk-fetch --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2 --fields key,summary,status

local_flags.name: fields-by-keys
local_flags.usage: Treat field identifiers as field keys instead of field IDs

local_flags.name: issues
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated issue keys or IDs (required, max 100 issues)

short: Bulk move issues to a target project and issue type (up to 1000)
example: jira-agent issue bulk-move --payload-json '{"targetToSourcesMapping":{"DEST":{"issueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1"],"targetIssueType":"Task"}}}'

local_flags.name: payload-json
local_flags.usage: Full JSON payload with targetToSourcesMapping and optional sendBulkNotification (required)

example: jira-agent issue bulk-status 10641

jira-agent issue bulk-transition --transitions-json '[{"selectedIssueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1"],"transitionId":"11"}]'
jira-agent issue bulk-transition --transitions-json '[{"selectedIssueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1"],"transitionId":"11"}]' --send-notification=false

local_flags.name: transitions-json
local_flags.usage: JSON array of transition inputs, e.g. [{"selectedIssueIdsOrKeys":["PROJ-1"],"transitionId":"11"}] (required)

short: List available transitions for bulk transition
example: jira-agent issue bulk-transitions --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2,PROJ-3

short: List changelog entries for an issue
example:
jira-agent issue changelog PROJ-123
jira-agent issue changelog PROJ-123 --max-results 10
jira-agent issue changelog list-by-ids PROJ-123 --ids 10001,10002
jira-agent issue changelog bulk-fetch --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2

jira-agent issue changelog bulk-fetch --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2
jira-agent issue changelog bulk-fetch --issues PROJ-1,PROJ-2 --field-ids status,assignee --max-results 100

local_flags.name: field-ids
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated field IDs to filter changelogs (max 10)

local_flags.name: issues
local_flags.usage: Comma-separated issue keys or IDs (required, max 1000)

example: jira-agent issue changelog list-by-ids PROJ-123 --ids 10001,10002

short: Transition an issue to a closed status with resolution
example:
jira-agent issue close PROJ-123
jira-agent issue close PROJ-123 --resolution "Won't Do"
jira-agent issue close PROJ-123 --status "Closed" --resolution "Duplicate" --comment "Duplicate of PROJ-100"

local_flags.name: resolution
local_flags.usage: Resolution value (e.g. Done, Won't Do, Duplicate)

example:
jira-agent issue comment list PROJ-123
jira-agent issue comment add PROJ-123 --body "This is a comment"

short: Add a comment to an issue
example:
jira-agent issue comment add PROJ-123 --body "This is a comment"
jira-agent issue comment add PROJ-123 --body "Internal note" --visibility-type role --visibility-value Developers

local_flags.name: body
local_flags.usage: Comment body (plain text or ADF JSON)

local_flags.name: visibility-type
local_flags.usage: Visibility restriction type: group or role

example: jira-agent issue comment delete PROJ-123 10001

jira-agent issue comment edit PROJ-123 10001 --body "Updated comment"
jira-agent issue comment edit PROJ-123 10001 --body "Updated" --notify=false

local_flags.name: body
local_flags.usage: New comment body (plain text or ADF JSON)

local_flags.name: visibility-type
local_flags.usage: Visibility restriction type: group or role

example: jira-agent issue comment get PROJ-123 10001

jira-agent issue comment list PROJ-123
jira-agent issue comment list PROJ-123 --order-by -created

local_flags.name: order-by
local_flags.usage: Sort field (prefix with - for descending, e.g. -created)

example: jira-agent issue comment list-by-ids --ids 10001,10002

short: Count issues matching a JQL query
example:
jira-agent issue count --jql "project = PROJ AND status = Open"
jira-agent issue count --jql "assignee = currentUser() AND resolution = Unresolved"

local_flags.name: jql
local_flags.usage: JQL query to count results for (required)

example:
jira-agent issue create --project PROJ --type Story --summary "New feature"
jira-agent issue create --project PROJ --type Bug --summary "Fix login" --priority High --labels bug,urgent
jira-agent issue create --project PROJ --type Task --summary "Subtask" --parent PROJ-100

local_flags.name: description
local_flags.usage: Description text, ADF JSON, or wiki markup with --description-format

local_flags.name: description-format
local_flags.usage: Description input format: auto, plain, adf, or wiki

local_flags.name: fields-json
local_flags.usage: JSON object of fields (alternative to individual flags)

local_flags.name: payload-json
local_flags.usage: Full JSON issue create payload, merged after field flags

local_flags.name: type
local_flags.usage: Issue type name (e.g. Story, Bug, Task)

short: Create an issue and assign it in one step
example:
jira-agent issue create-and-assign --project PROJ --type Story --summary "New feature"
jira-agent issue create-and-assign --project PROJ --type Bug --summary "Fix" --assignee abc123
jira-agent issue create-and-assign --project PROJ --type Task --summary "Chore" --skip-assign
jira-agent issue create-and-assign --project PROJ --type Story --summary "New" --dry-run

local_flags.name: description
local_flags.usage: Description text, ADF JSON, or wiki markup with --description-format

local_flags.name: description-format
local_flags.usage: Description input format: auto, plain, adf, or wiki

local_flags.name: fields-json
local_flags.usage: JSON object of fields (alternative to individual flags)

local_flags.name: payload-json
local_flags.usage: Full JSON issue create payload (mutually exclusive with individual field flags)

local_flags.name: type
local_flags.usage: Issue type name (e.g. Story, Bug, Task)

short: Create an issue and link it to an existing issue in one step
example:
jira-agent issue create-and-link --project PROJ --type Story --summary "New feature" --link-type Blocks --link-target PROJ-100
jira-agent issue create-and-link --project PROJ --type Bug --summary "Fix" --link-type "is blocked by" --link-target PROJ-200 --link-direction inward
jira-agent issue create-and-link --payload-json '{"fields":{"project":{"key":"PROJ"},"issuetype":{"name":"Task"},"summary":"Task"}}' --link-type Blocks --link-target PROJ-100

local_flags.name: description
local_flags.usage: Description text, ADF JSON, or wiki markup with --description-format

local_flags.name: description-format
local_flags.usage: Description input format: auto, plain, adf, or wiki

local_flags.name: fields-json
local_flags.usage: JSON object of fields (alternative to individual flags)

local_flags.name: link-target
local_flags.usage: Issue key to link to (e.g. PROJ-100)

local_flags.name: link-type
local_flags.usage: Link type name (e.g. Blocks, "is blocked by")

local_flags.name: payload-json
local_flags.usage: Full JSON issue create payload (mutually exclusive with individual field flags)

local_flags.name: type
local_flags.usage: Issue type name (e.g. Story, Bug, Task)

example:
jira-agent issue delete PROJ-123
jira-agent issue delete PROJ-123 --delete-subtasks

jira-agent issue edit PROJ-123 --summary "Updated summary"
jira-agent issue edit PROJ-123 --priority High --labels bug,critical
jira-agent issue edit PROJ-123 --fields-json '{"customfield_10001":"value"}'

local_flags.name: description
local_flags.usage: Description text, ADF JSON, or wiki markup with --description-format

local_flags.name: description-format
local_flags.usage: Description input format: auto, plain, adf, or wiki

local_flags.name: payload-json
local_flags.usage: Full JSON issue edit payload, merged after field flags

short: Get issue by key or ID
example:
jira-agent issue get PROJ-123
jira-agent issue get PROJ-123 --fields key,summary,status,assignee
jira-agent issue get PROJ-123 --fields-preset minimal
jira-agent issue get PROJ-123 --fields description --description-output-format markdown
jira-agent issue get PROJ-123 --expand changelog
jira-agent issue get PROJ-123 --raw

local_flags.name: description-output-format
local_flags.usage: Description output format: text, markdown, or adf

local_flags.name: fail-fast
local_flags.usage: Fail immediately if a requested field cannot be resolved

local_flags.name: fields-by-keys
local_flags.usage: Treat field identifiers as field keys instead of field IDs

local_flags.name: fields-preset
local_flags.usage: Named field preset: minimal, triage, or detail

local_flags.name: raw
local_flags.usage: Return the unmodified Jira API response for JSON output

local_flags.name: update-history
local_flags.usage: Add the issue to the user's recently viewed history

short: Issue link operations (list, add, delete, types)
example:
jira-agent issue link list PROJ-123
jira-agent issue link add --type Blocks --inward PROJ-1 --outward PROJ-2
jira-agent issue link types

short: Add a link between two issues
example:
jira-agent issue link add --type Blocks --inward PROJ-1 --outward PROJ-2
jira-agent issue link add --type-id 10001 --inward PROJ-1 --outward PROJ-2

local_flags.name: comment
local_flags.usage: Comment to add with the issue link

local_flags.name: type
local_flags.usage: Issue link type name, such as Blocks

example: jira-agent issue link delete 12345
jira-agent issue link get 12345

short: List issue links on an issue
example: jira-agent issue link list PROJ-123
jira-agent issue link types

short: Get create or edit metadata for issues
example:
jira-agent issue meta --project PROJ
jira-agent issue meta --project PROJ --type Story
jira-agent issue meta --operation edit --issue PROJ-123
